name: swarm-cockpit
description: Mission Control — an animated swarm cockpit for the equity-research engine

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c yellow,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.restart: lsof -ti:8787 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; npm --prefix server run start
